title: Spin Coating Graphene
description: You can buy my book  Graphene 101 An Inventors guide to making graphene at https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/304668 the money will help my research. thanks. I adapted my magnetic stirrer for this - Actually just by adding a shield - the stirrer stayed a stirrer - which is good as I use the thing all the time! Anyway hope it's helpful.
